title: Cloud Infrastructure Engineer
description:
Cloud Engineer

Avensys is a reputed global IT professional services company headquartered in Singapore. Our service spectrum includes enterprise solution consulting, business intelligence, business process automation and managed services. Given our decade of success, we have evolved to become one of the top trusted providers in Singapore and service a client base across banking and financial services, insurance, information technology, healthcare, retail and supply chain.

We are currently looking to hire a Cloud Infra Engineer. This is an exciting opportunity to expand your skill set, achieve job satisfaction and work-life balance. More details as below.

JOB TYPE:

Long Term Contract

Responsibilities:

•                 Manage and administer Windows Server (Wintel) environments hosted on AWS, including deployment, configuration, and lifecycle management of EC2 instances and related cloud resources.

•                 Monitor cloud infrastructure health and performance using AWS CloudWatch, CloudTrail, and other native monitoring tools to ensure high availability and rapid issue resolution.

•                 Implement and maintain high availability (HA) and disaster recovery (DR) solutions; conduct quarterly DR drills to validate business continuity.

•                 Optimize AWS resource utilization by troubleshooting and resolving issues related to virtual machines, networking, and cloud storage performance.

•                 Apply security patches and system updates regularly to ensure compliance with security best practices and minimize vulnerabilities.

•                 Collaborate with application teams to harden IIS configurations, enhancing the performance and security of hosted web applications.

•                 Administer and maintain Active Directory (AD), including user provisioning, group policy management (GPO), and DHCP configurations across multiple domains.

•  Design,implement, and maintain Group Policy Objects (GPOs) to enforce consistent security and system configurations across Singapore.

• Work in collaboration with cybersecurity teams to implement AWS-native security measures, respond to threats, and ensure infrastructure hardening.

• Provide hands-on support for cloud migration projects, assisting with integration, modernization, and performance tuning of legacy systems in AWS
Requirements:

•   At least 2-5 years in managing Cloud platform like AWS/Azure etc.

•   AWSCertification preferred.

•                Team player

CONSULTANT DETAILS

Consultant Name: Khalid Farooq

Avensys Consulting Pte Ltd

EA Licence 12C5759

Privacy Statement: Data collected will be used for recruitment purposes only. Personal data provided will be used strictly in accordance with the relevant data protection law and Avensys' personal information and privacy policy

postedCompany.description: Avensys is among the leaders in providing technology enabled business solutions and services. Since inception, Avensys has helped clients use IT more efficiently to improve their operations and profitability, focus on core competencies and achieve business results such as increased agility, innovation and profitable growth. Our in-depth technical knowledge coupled with industry experience and our unique methodologies enable us to successfully deliver and meet our customer’s expectations.
postedCompany.name: AVENSYS CONSULTING PTE. LTD.
